source_idiom: sorriso de uma orelha a outra
target_idiom: กระดี่ได้น้ำ
source_meaning: smile from ear to ear (large smile)
target_meaning: An overjoyed person.

target_idiom: กลัวเหมือนหนูกลัวแมว
source_meaning: to act apprehensively
target_meaning: to be cowardly.

target_idiom: กองทัพเดินด้วยท้อง
source_meaning: I could eat a horse (I am very hungry)
target_meaning: An army marches on its stomach.

target_idiom: ก้างขวางคอ
source_meaning: to act as a third wheel (to be an unwanted third party accompanying two people on a date)
target_meaning: person who prevents a loving couple from enjoying a romantic moment.

target_idiom: การลงมือ
source_meaning: to roll up one's sleeves
target_meaning: abstract noun of ลงมือ (long-mʉʉ)

target_idiom: การลงขัน
source_meaning: to play association football
target_meaning: abstract noun of ลงขัน (long-kǎn)

target_idiom: กำขี้ดีกว่ากำตด
source_meaning: six of one, half a dozen of the other (to take a course of action that doesn’t make a difference)
target_meaning: something is better than nothing; half a loaf is better than none.

target_idiom: กินข้าวแดง
source_meaning: to serve time
target_meaning: to be imprisoned for a crime.

target_idiom: เกาะชายกระโปรง
source_meaning: depending on or sustaining from (someone or something), chiefly in an unfair way, like taking advantage
target_meaning: to depend on a woman for livelihood.

target_idiom: แก่แดด
source_meaning: ahead of one's time (in advance of commonly accepted ideas)
target_meaning: precocious.

target_idiom: ไก่โห่
source_meaning: barking cough (a loud, intense cough)
target_meaning: cockcrow.

target_idiom: เข้าเมืองตาหลิ่วต้องหลิ่วตาตาม
source_meaning: to adopt certain ideas or attitudes that would make someone accepted by someone else or a group
target_meaning: to follow local custom; to follow the majority.

source_idiom: o pão que o diabo amassou
target_idiom: งอมพระราม
source_meaning: great suffering or strife in one's life
target_meaning: in dire straits; experiencing great hardship; undergoing severe suffering.

target_idiom: โจรห้าร้อย
source_meaning: ballsiness, toughness, courage
target_meaning: bold, reckless criminal or outlaw.

target_idiom: เชือดไก่ให้ลิงดู
source_meaning: to not punish someone enough or at all for something wrong they did
target_meaning: to punish someone as an example for another.

source_idiom: mais velho que o cagar em cócoras
target_idiom: เฒ่าหัวงู
source_meaning: to be old as the hills, to be older than dirt
target_meaning: dirty old man.

target_idiom: ซื้อเวลา
source_meaning: to take too much time on purpose; to stall, waste time
target_meaning: to buy time.

target_idiom: ดอกฟ้ากับหมาวัด
source_meaning: blind date (romantic meeting between two people who have never met before)
target_meaning: persons that do not seem suiting each other as romantic lovers because of their greatly different social standings.

target_idiom: ตกฟาก
source_meaning: to give birth
target_meaning: to be born; to be given birth; to be delivered.

target_idiom: ติเรือทั้งโกลน
source_meaning: to criticise something that is fine; to be excessively perfectionist
target_meaning: to criticise something whilst it is still incomplete.

target_idiom: ตีปีก
source_meaning: to feel an extremely deep sense of accomplishment
target_meaning: to be overjoyed; to be elated.

target_idiom: ถีบหัวส่ง
source_meaning: to exhaust, use up
target_meaning: to expel, drive out, or sever relations with someone, especially when that one is of no more use.

target_idiom: ถอนหงอก
source_meaning: to humiliate, to play or to treat someone with despise
target_meaning: to treat an adult or senior with contempt or disrespect; to show contempt or disrespect towards an adult or senior; to subject an adult or senior to contempt or disrespect.

target_idiom: น้ำตาจระเข้
source_meaning: crocodile tears (display of tears that is forced or false)
target_meaning: crocodile tear.

target_idiom: น้ำท่า
source_meaning: deep water (difficult or embarrassing situation)
target_meaning: water; body of water.

target_idiom: ป้ายสี
source_meaning: to besmirch the reputation of a person or thing
target_meaning: to slander; to smear; to sully, vilify, or soil a good name, reputation, etc.

target_idiom: ปิดทองหลังพระ
source_meaning: to do something well and willingly
target_meaning: to do good deeds without seeking attention or praise.

target_idiom: ปีหน้าฟ้าใหม่
source_meaning: to turn years, to have a birthday
target_meaning: new year; next year; year to come; year ahead.

target_idiom: เป็นหูเป็นตา
source_meaning: just in case, just to be on the safe side
target_meaning: to be on guard or vigilant (on behalf of or for the sake of someone)

source_idiom: desde que eu me conheço por gente
target_idiom: แผลเก่า
source_meaning: since I remember
target_meaning: unforgettable painful memory.

target_idiom: ฝากผีฝากไข้
source_meaning: to vouch for; to trust (someone) with one's life [ ]
target_meaning: to entrust one's life to someone; to ask someone to take care of one until one's last breath.

target_idiom: มือเติบ
source_meaning: to do something excessively (e.g. to eat too much)
target_meaning: to lack restraint in spending money; to spend much more money than is necessary or wise; to be prodigal; to be extravagant.

source_idiom: ser mais fácil uma cobra fumar do que
target_idiom: ลม ๆ แล้ง ๆ
source_meaning: indicates that something is extremely unlikely; when pigs fly; to find hen's teeth.
target_meaning: not likely to come true, not likely to happen; fantastic, irrational, groundless; futile, useless.

target_idiom: ลูกไม้หล่นไม่ไกลต้น
source_meaning: mix apples and oranges
target_meaning: the apple does not fall far from the tree

target_idiom: เล่นหูเล่นตา
source_meaning: to hit on (to approach seeking romance, love, sex, etc)
target_meaning: to flirt with the eyes; to make eyes at.

target_idiom: วันดีคืนดี
source_meaning: one of these days (some time in the future)
target_meaning: one fine day.

target_idiom: เลื่อยขาเก้าอี้
source_meaning: to be superseded
target_meaning: to unseat; to dethrone; to topple

target_idiom: วัวหายล้อมคอก
source_meaning: it's too late; what's done is done
target_meaning: to close the stable door after the horse has bolted.

target_idiom: สร้างภาพ
source_meaning: to pretend, to make believe
target_meaning: to create, publish, or promote a good image (of, about, etc); to propagandise (a good point of); to pretend, to act, or to put on an act (to make oneself, someone, or something look good); to be pretentious, fake, insincere, ingenuine, or hypocritic.

target_idiom: สันดอนขุดง่าย สันดานขุดยาก
source_meaning: the tendency of doing something because it is a habit even when it is not necessary or expected
target_meaning: it is not easy to fix a bad habit.

target_idiom: สาธารณรัฐกล้วย
source_meaning: banana republic (country dependent on a single export commodity with a corrupt dictatorial government)
target_meaning: banana republic

target_idiom: สายป่าน
source_meaning: gold mine (very profitable economic venture)
target_meaning: resources, especially for use in producing more wealth or advancing a project.

target_idiom: สิ้นไร้ไม้ตอก
source_meaning: destitute; penniless (extremely poor)
target_meaning: very impoverished; experiencing serious financial hardship; penniless; penurious; extremely poor; needy.

target_idiom: สิบปากว่าไม่เท่าตาเห็น
source_meaning: can you believe it?
target_meaning: Seeing is believing.

target_idiom: สีซอให้ควายฟัง
source_meaning: not to do anything productive; to fool around
target_meaning: to waste time reasoning with a fool; to waste time giving advice, instruction, or explanation to a fool.

target_idiom: เสือผู้หญิง
source_meaning: hunk, stud (an attractive man)
target_meaning: lady's man; womanizer.

target_idiom: หนอนบ่อนไส้
source_meaning: fifth column (a group of people which clandestinely undermines a larger group)
target_meaning: spy; inside agent; mole.

target_idiom: หน้าซื่อใจคด
source_meaning: holier-than-thou (hypocritically or self-righteously pious)
target_meaning: hypocritical

target_idiom: หน้าเนื้อใจเสือ
source_meaning: wolf in sheep's clothing (a disguised danger)
target_meaning: good or kind on the appearance, but actually wicked or evil.

target_idiom: หนึ่งในตองอู
source_meaning: one or another (a very small subset)
target_meaning: exceptional person; the smartest person; the one of a kind; the one and only.

source_idiom: conhecer como a palma da mão
target_idiom: หมองูตายเพราะงู
source_meaning: to know like the back of one's hand (to be intimately or highly knowledgeable about)
target_meaning: one who perishes because of something which one has the best knowledge about or is very familiar with.

target_idiom: หมาไม่แดก
source_meaning: to be exceptionally delicious
target_meaning: extremely undelicious; very unpleasant to the taste.

target_idiom: หักหลัง
source_meaning: to cheat (on one's partner)
target_meaning: to betray.

target_idiom: หัวขี้เลื่อย
source_meaning: nonsensical; absurd
target_meaning: stupid; idiotic; unintelligent.

target_idiom: หัวโต๊ะ
source_meaning: most importantly; primarily; mainly; chiefly; first and foremost
target_meaning: head; leader; chief; chairperson; president; presiding officer.

target_idiom: ใหญ่หลวง
source_meaning: massive, gigantic, humongous
target_meaning: great (in size or effect).

target_idiom: อำนาจบาตรใหญ่
source_meaning: with total power or will
target_meaning: power or authority (when exercised oppressively or abusively).

target_idiom: เอาใจเขามาใส่ใจเรา
source_meaning: if the shoe fits; if the cap fits
target_meaning: to put oneself in someone's shoes.

target_idiom: เอาถ่าน
source_meaning: to be frank, loyal
target_meaning: to be serious, to be earnest, to be industrious.

target_idiom: อุ่นใจ
source_meaning: to rest on one's laurels (to rely on a past success instead of trying to improve oneself further)
target_meaning: to rest easy; to rest assured; to be relieved.
